title: Workshops/Symposiums * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Workshops/Symposiums * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports Oregon adoptive families, state-assisted guardians, and adult adoptees with services like specialized consultations, supportive listening, resource referrals, and free training for families and the professionals who serve them. 6443 SW Beaverton Hillsdale Highway Suite 205 Portland, OR 97221 Eligibility: The organization provides full support to all adoptive and assisted guardianship families in Oregon, adult adoptees, and offers some services to resource families and the professionals who support them Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 241-0799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER OREGON POST ADOPTION RESOURCE CENTER
